events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: The legendary Queen guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday Angle
angles.copy: A true rock icon celebrates his birthday this week. From stadium anthems to guitar solos that define generations, Brian May turns 79. What's your favourite Queen track and why?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday Angle
angles.copy: Still moving like Jagger at 83! The legendary Rolling Stones frontman marks another year. Which Stones track always gets you dancing?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) first launched in the United States on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' "Video Killed The Radio Star" as its inaugural music video.

angles.name: MTV Launch Angle
angles.copy: It was 45 years ago today that MTV burst onto our screens, changing music forever. The first video? 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill the radio star, or just give it a new lease of life?

events.title: Oasis' Definitely Maybe turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary Angle
angles.copy: Thirty-two years ago, Oasis dropped their debut album 'Definitely Maybe', kicking off a Britpop phenomenon. What's your stand-out track from this iconic record?

events.title: Woodstock Festival: 57 years on
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place in Bethel, New York, from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary Angle
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people descended on a dairy farm for three days of peace, love, and music. The spirit of Woodstock lives on. If you could have been there, which artist would you have wanted to see most?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary Angle
angles.copy: Forty-nine years since we lost the King. Elvis Presley's music and legacy continue to define rock and roll. What's your all-time favourite Elvis hit?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday Angle
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the rock and roll icon, Chrissie Hynde! From 'Brass in Pocket' to 'Don't Get Me Wrong', her voice is unmistakable. What's your favourite Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The former Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday Angle
angles.copy: Our Kid turns 54! Liam Gallagher, the voice of a generation, celebrates his birthday. What's your favourite Liam moment, musical or otherwise?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day is celebrated annually on October 5th, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day Angle
angles.copy: It's James Bond Day! Celebrating 007 and all things Bond. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles legend, John Lennon.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering a musical visionary today. John Lennon would have turned 86. His legacy of peace and iconic songs continues to inspire. What's your favourite Lennon lyric?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday Angle
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the one and only John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, his comedic genius is unmatched. What's your favourite John Cleese moment?
